title: 印度直接把苹果开源了... | 原文
content: Hackers attacked Tata Electronics, an Indian Apple supplier, in June, stealing 200,000 documents and 630GB of data including complete iPhone engineering schematics, chip manuals, drop test videos, and full supplier lists. The stolen confidential Apple information has been sold on the dark web for over half a month. The incident ironically contradicts claims of India's "cosmic-level" cybersecurity defense.

title: 语音输入戒指OASIS走红，Vibe Coding带火了一波AI硬件
content: Smart ring OASIS Ring gains attention as a voice-input device for AI control, joining the Vibe Coding hardware trend alongside products like Insta360's Vibe Coding Mic Air. Unlike traditional health-focused smart rings, it uses built-in microphones and motion sensors to let users interact with AI via voice and gestures anywhere. While rings offer convenience for quick commands, critics argue their small size limits audio quality, battery life, and output capabilities, making them supplementary rather than core productivity tools. The broader trend reflects competition to redefine AI interaction beyond keyboards and screens toward wearable, voice-activated devices.

title: Anthropic拟全面封禁地下通道
content: Anthropic is aggressively blocking all methods used to bypass regional restrictions on accessing its AI Claude, with a strict policy effective July 3, 2026. The ban covers personal overseas accounts, foreign subsidiaries, API relays, and cloud service workarounds—even for companies registered outside restricted regions. Detection methods include IP blocking, credit card filtering, and system-level checks like timezone settings. Users found violating terms face permanent account suspension without refunds. Following this crackdown, Alibaba has ordered employees to uninstall Anthropic products by July 10, potentially benefiting domestic Chinese AI alternatives.

title: 趁火打劫，GPT-5.6三大模型全曝，定档7月7日？
content: Code in OpenAI's Codex app revealed three GPT-5.6 sub-models—Sol, Terra, and Luna—along with a "speed dial" feature letting users balance speed and quality. Rumors point to a July 7 launch window deliberately timed when Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 faces access limits. Leaked tests suggest GPT-5.6 outperforms Fable 5 in efficiency and task clarity, while pricing may undercut competitors. Real-time voice support appears delayed. Developers were warned that unused Codex rate-limit reset credits expire around July 12.

title: 股神巴菲特的投资滑铁卢事件
content: The article details major investment failures by renowned investors. Graham lost 70% in the 1929-1932 crash due to leverage and overconfidence, later warning about bull markets. Bogle was fired from Wellington Fund before founding Vanguard, learning that active management rarely beats markets. Buffett's worst mistake was Dexter Shoes, costing $6 billion in opportunity costs through stock-based acquisition. Munger emphasizes managing absolute losses and relative underperformance through patience and discipline. The piece concludes that losses are inevitable; investors should avoid regret, learn from mistakes, and maintain long-term perspective.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 鑫鑫-投资

title: 太蠢，不配用 Claude Fable 5？
content: Anthropic's Fable 5 model was found labeling some user queries "TOO_DUMB_TO_NEED_FABLE" in logs, routing them to a cheaper model. More notably, leaked "reasoning traces" showed the model using dense, almost unreadable internal notation—including markers like "GRRR," "GAAAH," and "DATA DATA DATA. GO."—during complex problem-solving. Researchers suggest these are functional state markers rather than genuine emotions, analogous to human scratchpad notes. The incident highlights tensions around AI interpretability: visible reasoning aids safety audits, but highly compressed internal representations may become increasingly opaque to humans, raising concerns about monitoring advanced systems.
eventKey: 不配用-claude-fable
normalizedTitle: 太蠢 不配用 claude fable 5

title: 紫金矿业周期性的思考-宏观视角
content: The author argues Zijin Mining is not a traditional cyclical stock. While all industries have cycles, Zijin's resource investments align with long-term Kondratiev cycles (technology revolutions). Copper and gold benefit from sustained demand for electrification, AI infrastructure, and currency devaluation concerns, with supply constraints from declining ore grades and long development timelines. Lithium faces short-term oversupply but cost-advantaged producers like Zijin can reduce output. Unlike strong cyclical sectors (aluminum, cement, shipping, chemicals), copper and gold lack the "prisoner's dilemma" characteristics that force distressed production during downturns. The author sees Zijin's positioning across copper, gold, lithium, and minor metals as structurally favorable through at least 2050, with recession risk being the primary near-term concern.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 天生我财币要用
eventKey: 紫金矿业周期性的思考-宏观视角
normalizedTitle: 紫金矿业周期性的思考-宏观视角

title: claude 被封之后尝试国产替代
content: After Claude was blocked, the user tested Chinese AI alternatives on Qoder for a simple Android launcher bug: preventing app drawer background from extending into the status bar. DeepSeek V4 Pro fixed it correctly with emulator verification, though it mistakenly amended a merged PR before creating a new one. Qwen 3.7 Max failed on search bar background. MiniMax 2.7 fixed it but made excessive changes without verifying. Kimi 2.7 and GLM 5.2 failed despite long thinking times. DeepSeek performed best overall. Testing was informal with single attempts per model.
eventKey: claude-被封之后尝试国产替代
normalizedTitle: claude 被封之后尝试国产替代

title: “消暑神器”爆卖，从9.9卖到799，有商家年销10亿
content: Once considered a disposable 9.9-yuan seasonal item, portable handheld fans have evolved into a serious branded electronics category with price points reaching 799 yuan. Brands like Xiaomi, Dyson, and Anker have entered the market, while leaders such as Jisu achieve annual revenues exceeding 1 billion yuan through product innovation in motor technology, design, and features like mist cooling. The category, now valued at roughly 5 billion yuan and growing, is shifting from commodity to lifestyle accessory across commuting, office, and outdoor scenarios. Success increasingly depends on combining consumer electronics-style user insight with traditional appliance manufacturing capabilities.
eventKey: “消暑神器”爆卖-9卖到799-有商家年销10亿
normalizedTitle: “消暑神器”爆卖 从9 9卖到799 有商家年销10亿

title: 脆皮中年人，集体过上「三无生活」
content: Middle-aged Chinese workers increasingly adopt "three-free" drinks—sugar-free, caffeine-free, and alcohol-free—as aging reduces their tolerance for stimulants. These beverages function as a compromise: they preserve social rituals and personal habits while minimizing health impacts. Though regulations allow trace amounts in "free" labeling, the products serve as practical placebos. Market data shows explosive growth in sugar-free drinks (projected $75 billion by 2027) and non-alcoholic beer ($13 billion in 2023). Ultimately, this trend reflects middle-aged acceptance of declining energy and a deliberate choice to conserve remaining vitality for meaningful priorities.
eventKey: 脆皮中年人-集体过上「三无生活」
normalizedTitle: 脆皮中年人 集体过上「三无生活」

title: 人工智能时代，如何重新想象你的工作
content: The article explores how AI transforms knowledge work from producing outputs to designing "idea architectures." The author contrasts Adobe's cloud-based file distribution with Figma's element-based design system to illustrate this shift. Instead of repurposing content across channels, workers should deconstruct ideas into reusable components and reassemble them for different contexts. The author applies this approach to his book "Reshuffle" through an interactive companion guide with mind maps and exploration paths. He shares his 15-year practice of building a 100,000+ idea knowledge base, now using generative AI to activate its latent value through modular, retrievable, and generative systems.
eventKey: 人工智能时代-如何重新想象你的工作
normalizedTitle: 人工智能时代 如何重新想象你的工作

title: 不设付费墙的英国卫报，在美国成功“化缘” | 原文
content: The Guardian's U.S. operations achieved record revenue of over $81.4 million in the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, marking a 15-year high since entering the American market. Revenue grew 25% annually over the past two fiscal years, rising from $52.3 million in 2023 to $65.3 million in 2025 before reaching the new peak. The British newspaper maintains a free-access model without paywalls.

title: 西安赛格坠亡案：员工称销售压力大，拆单疑为潜规则
content: A man fell to his death on July 1 at Xi'an SEG International Shopping Center. The deceased was reportedly the head of Shaanxi Lihe Trading, an agent for Nike and other brands. He faced an 11.45 million yuan penalty for staff splitting orders to exploit shopping vouchers during a 2020 anniversary sale. The company recently received notice its lease would not be renewed. He had attempted suicide in May. Authorities have launched an investigation. Splitting orders to use vouchers was reportedly common practice for high-priced brands at the mall.

title: 韩国联合三星、SK 等企业推出 312 万亿韩元投资计划，重点布局半导体与航天产业
content: South Korea announced a 312 trillion won ($204 billion) investment plan led by major conglomerates including SK Group, Samsung, Hanwha, and Hyundai Motor to develop advanced manufacturing and AI industries in the Yeongnam region. The investments target semiconductors, AI, and aerospace sectors, with LG and Doosan also participating. Additionally, Korea unveiled a national aerospace strategy centered on Sacheon to build a southern coastal aerospace industry belt.
